revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{ifsubst||}}{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{2|}}}
}}{{{3|}}}
{{{{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using divbox with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Divbox]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y|style| 1 | 2 | 3 | radius }} }}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Divbox here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
